Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $411,331,607Details
International Box Office $544,444,197
Worldwide Box Office $955,775,804
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,027,909
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $13,251,817
Total $18,279,726
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Marvel Studios' “Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness”—a thrilling ride through the Multiverse with Doctor Strange, his trusted friend Wong and Wanda Maximoff, aka Scarlet Witch.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$187,420,998 (45.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.19 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,534 opening theaters/4,534 max. theaters, 6.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $467,191,459

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 6th, 2022 (Wide) by Walt Disney
May 6th, 2022 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: May 4th, 2022 (Wide) (Thailand)
May 4th, 2022 (Wide) (Denmark)

May 4th, 2022 (Wide) (Austria)

Video Release: June 22nd, 2022 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence and action, frightening images and some language.

Running Time: 126 minutes
Franchise: Marvel Cinematic Universe, Doctor Strange

Genre:Action

Synopsis

Marvel Studios' “Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness”—a thrilling ride through the Multiverse with Doctor Strange, his trusted friend Wong and Wanda Maximoff, aka Scarlet Witch.

Opening Weekend:$187,420,998 (45.6% of total gross)

Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $467,191,459
